register.title: Create account
register.cancelledBody: You can try again whenever you want.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email. You will receive a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a reset link.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.invalidLinkBody: Invalid link. Request a new reset link.

changePassword.forcedIntro: For your security, replace the temporary password given by your manager before continuing.
changePassword.doneBody: Your other sessions have been signed out.
changePassword.sameAsOld: The new password must be different from the old one
changePassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

subscriptionBlocked.summary: Your Comptoir subscription has expired or been cancelled. Access to the app is suspended.
subscriptionBlocked.reassurance: Your data is preserved. Reactivate your subscription to regain access to your schedule and all features.
subscriptionBlocked.workerNote: Contact the manager of your restaurant to reactivate the subscription.

passwordAdvice.fourWordsBody: A sequence of 4 randomly chosen words — not a meaningful phrase — is both robust and easy to remember. Length matters more than tricky symbols.
passwordAdvice.avoidNote: Avoid: the name of the site, your first name, your date of birth, a well-known phrase (lyrics, quotes).
passwordAdvice.managerTitle: Let a password manager generate one for you
passwordAdvice.managerBody: Even simpler: a manager picks the words at random and memorises everything. You only have one master password to remember.
passwordAdvice.neverReuse: Never reuse the same password across multiple sites.
